reviews.review_body: School has good ambience, need to work on landscaping the front office staff are always welcoming and well informed. The school organises lots of activities for children

reviews.school_name: Quantums Modern Mission High School - Bowenpally
reviews.author: u d
reviews.review_body: My experience  with this school is exceptional.small class sizes and leveled learning enables children to gain confidence in learning abilities. The school is committed to the whole child. They teach value lessons communication and leadership skills. Patriotism is also present in their activities. Keep it up.

and extra curricular activities are fully encouraged.
